name: FrameMetric
description: The frame name, metric type, and thread states. These are used to derive the value of the metric for the frame.

allOf.description: Name of the method common across the multiple occurrences of a frame in an application profile.
List of application runtime thread states used to get the counts for a frame a derive a metric value.

A type of aggregation that specifies how a metric for a frame is analyzed. The supported value AggregatedRelativeTotalTime is an aggregation of the metric value for one frame that is calculated across the occurrences of all frames in a profile.
